pi_items.source: Verified against task description and export_result.sh constraints.
Verified against task description and export_result.sh constraints.
Verified against task description and export_result.sh constraints.

Parsed the actual downloaded HIV-1 reference genome (NC_001802.1 or AF033819.3) from NCBI. The gag/pol ribosomal frameshift overlap (slippery sequence 'TTTTTTAGGGA') starts at nucleotide 1631, not 2085. The claimed value of 2085 erroneously corresponds to the HXB2 isolate (K03455.1) rather than the provided sequences.

Parsed the actual downloaded HIV-1 reference genome (NC_001802.1 or AF033819.3) from NCBI. The gag CDS feature ends at nucleotide 1838, not 2292. The claimed value of 2292 erroneously corresponds to the HXB2 isolate (K03455.1) rather than the provided sequences.
Calculated the length of the true overlap region on the downloaded data (1838 - 1631 + 1 = 208). The claimed length matches the true length, despite the incorrect start and end coordinates.
Verified against task description instructions and export_result.sh parsing logic.
Verified against task description instructions and export_result.sh parsing logic.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real HIV-1 reference genome data (NC_001802.1 or AF033819.3) downloaded dynamically from NCBI. The expected GenBank, FASTA, and report output file paths exactly match the task description and export scripts. However, the metadata claims for overlap_start (2085) and overlap_end (2292) are incorrect for the provided sequences. In NC_001802.1 and AF033819.3, the gag/pol overlap begins at the ribosomal frameshift site 'TTTTTTAGGGA' at nucleotide 1631, and the gag CDS ends at nucleotide 1838. Therefore, the true overlap coordinates are 1631..1838. The overlap_length claim of 208 is mathematically correct for both the claimed and true coordinates. The task is critically defective because the local verifier strictly enforces the incorrect HXB2 coordinates (2085..2292), causing perfectly correct annotations on the provided sequence to be rejected.
